data.title: Mitsubishi Logisnext Americas reveals $5,000 scholarship winner for their 22nd Annual Cat® Lift Trucks Scholarship Program.
data.description: Houston, on March 4, 2026 – Mitsubishi Logisnext Americas, the sole producer and supplier of Cat® Lift Trucks throughout North, Central, and South America, disclosed the winner of its 22nd Annual Cat® Lift Trucks Scholarship Program. The scholarship awarded this year totals $5,000.

data.title: Bobbie's infant formulas named "Top Choice" by Consumer Reports for heavy metal safety, non-detect/low levels in all formulas.
data.description: In Heath, Ohio, Bobbie, a pediatric nutrition company founded by a mom, revealed that Consumer Reports, a prominent nonprofit consumer advocacy group, has recognized its range of organic and grass-fed infant formulas as "Top Choices." Through successive assessments in March 2025 and March 2026, Consumer Reports identified negligible to minimal levels of heavy metals and toxins in all four of Bobbie's infant formula products. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to providing safe and high-quality nutrition for babies.

data.title: Bioxytran sees positive dose optimization, moves to Phase 3 trial for ProLectin-M with 408 patients, targeting viral infected outpatients.
data.description: A company has begun regulatory discussions with the Central Drugs Standard Control Organization (CDSCO). They are planning to conduct a pivotal study with 408 patients focusing on standard-risk outpatients infected with various viruses.

data.title: VIP Seat Podcast collaborates with AB Jets, recording episode at 43,000 feet; marks a unique milestone for the show.
data.description: A popular business aviation podcast has collaborated with a charter operator based in Memphis for a unique live recording. The VIP Seat, a rapidly expanding podcast in the aviation industry, recently produced a full episode while flying at an altitude of 43,000 feet on board an AB Jets aircraft. This collaboration took place on March 4, 2026, showcasing the podcast's innovative approach to engaging with its audience.

data.title: Schoox wins 2026 Lighthouse Tech Awards for AI-driven workforce performance; recognized for connecting skills, employee development.
data.description: Schoox, an AI-engineered learning and workforce performance platform for frontline enterprises, based in Austin, Texas, received double recognition on March 4, 2026. The platform connects skills, employee development, and measurable workforce performance. The announcement highlighted Schoox's role in enhancing workforce capabilities.

data.title: Kaldalón hf. to hold Annual General Meeting on March 26, 2026, at 16:00 GMT at Reykjavík Natura, Nauthólsvegur 52, 101 Reykjavík.
data.description: Kaldalón hf.'s Board of Directors has officially disclosed that the Annual General Meeting of the company is scheduled for Thursday, March 26, 2026, at 16:00 GMT. The gathering will take place at Reykjavík Natura, situated at Nauthólsvegur 52, 101 Reykjavík.

data.title: Bitcoin analysts warn of a potential sucker's rally unless BTC maintains $70K, needs to defend $68K to reach $75K.
data.description: For Bitcoin (BTC) to overcome the significant resistance level at $75,000, it must first experience a decrease in profit-taking activities and successfully protect the 200-week Exponential Moving Average (EMA) support at $68,000. These steps are crucial in paving the way for a potential breakthrough in price.

data.title: Habitat for Humanity celebrates Alta Vista Ranch community, providing diverse housing for families in South Phoenix.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Habitat for Humanity of Central Arizona revealed plans for a Homecoming Celebration at Alta Vista Ranch community, showcasing success in offering varied and economical housing choices to families in South Phoenix. This event signifies a major achievement in Habitat's mission to provide affordable housing solutions, with a focus on inclusivity and support for the local community.

data.title: Blind deputy Wang Yongcheng aids disabled in Fuzhou and Nanjing, China, striving to make a positive impact.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Beijing, Wang Yongcheng, a delegate to China's top legislature, the National People's Congress, conducted visits to residents living with disabilities and facing disadvantages in Fuzhou and Nanjing county.
